title: rubus incultus
intro: Rubus incultus, also known as wild raspberry or bramble, is a type of flowering shrub native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Rubus incultus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive health. Rubus incultus can be prepared as herbal tea, juice, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
